paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 23. 49 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — cleared all overdue.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **18 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $28,096 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 4 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,830 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** Down to 3 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $11,550 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** Down to 2 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $24,094 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $21,177 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $13,345 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

252 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **93 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 12 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$82,335 in payments going out this week** across 33 tasks — make sure funds are available. $41,283 expected in from 3 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) and Stephanie and Marc Felton — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 4. This needs to turn around today.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 4 overdue — oldest first. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Clean — 6 tasks in progress. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 28 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 8. Keep the momentum going.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 10 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **18 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 53 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** Down to 2 overdue — good. Close them out today. **20 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 38 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** Clean — 1 tasks in progress. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 1. Keep the momentum going.
**Ginger Brown:** Down to 3 overdue — good. Close them out today. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 30 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Clean — 6 tasks in progress. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 23 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Clean — 4 tasks in progress. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 10 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
